title: 数组和链表
content:
数组

package Array;

import org.junit.Test;

/**
 * 自定义数组类
 */
public class Array<T> {
    private T[] data;
    private int size;
    public Array(){
        this(10);
    }
    private Array(int capacity){
        data = (T[]) new Object[capacity];
        size = 0;
    }
    //返回数组中的元素个数
    public int getSize(){
        return size;
    }
    //返回数组的长度
    public int getCapacity(){
        return data.length;
    }
    //判断数组是否为空
    public boolean isEmpty(){
        return size == 0;
    }
    //向数组中指定位置添加元素
    public void add(int index,T t){
        if(index < 0 || index > size)//下标合法性判断
            throw new IllegalArgumentException("插入元素失败，下标不合法。");
        if(size == data.length)//数组容量判断
            resize(data.length << 1);
        //元素插入操作
        for (int i = size; i > index; i--) {
            data[i] = data[i-1];
        }
        data[index] = t;
        size++;
    }
    private void resize(int newCapacity){//扩容和缩容操作
        T[] newData = (T[]) new Object[newCapacity];
        for (int i = 0 ;i < size ;i ++){
            newData[i] = data[i];
        }
        data = newData;
    }
    //在末尾添加元素
    public void addLast(T t){
        add(size,t);
    }
    //在开头添加元素
    public void addFirst(T t){
        add(0,t);
    }
    //删除指定位置的元素
    public T remove(int index){
        if(index < 0 || index >= size)//下标合法性判断
            throw new IllegalArgumentException("删除元素失败，下标不合法。");
        T removedElem = data[index];
        for (int i = index; i < size-1 ; i++) {
            data[i] = data[i+1];
        }
        data[size] = null;
        size--;
        if(size == data.length /4 && data.length /4 != 0)
            resize(data.length /2);//缩容避免震荡复杂度
        return removedElem;
    }
    //删除末尾元素
    public T removeLast(){
        return remove(size-1);
    }
    //删除第一个元素
    public T removeFirst(){
        return remove(0);
    }
    //获取指定位置的元素
    public T get(int index){
        if(index < 0 || index >= size)//下标合法性判断
            throw new IllegalArgumentException("获取元素失败，下标不合法。");
        return data[index];
    }
    //修改指定位置的元素
    public void set(int index,T t){
        if(index < 0 || index >= size)//下标合法性判断
            throw new IllegalArgumentException("修改元素失败，下标不合法。");
        data[index] = t;
    }

    @Override
    public String toString() {
        StringBuilder stringBuilder = new StringBuilder();
        stringBuilder.append(String.format("Array[size:%d  capacity:%d]\n",size,data.length));
        stringBuilder.append("[");
        for (int i = 0; i < size; i++) {
            if (i != size-1)
                stringBuilder.append(data[i] + ",");
        }
        stringBuilder.append(data[size-1]+"]");
        return stringBuilder.toString();
    }

    @Test
    public void test(){
        Array<Integer> arr = new Array<Integer>();
        for (int i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
            arr.addLast(i);
        }
        System.out.println(arr);
        arr.add(1,90);
        System.out.println(arr);
        arr.addFirst(30);
        System.out.println(arr);
        arr.remove(2);
        System.out.println(arr);
        arr.removeFirst();
        System.out.println(arr);
        System.out.println(arr.get(3));
        arr.set(5,100);
        System.out.println(arr);

    }

}

链表

package datastructure.linkedlist;

/**
 * 链表的实现
 */
public class LinkedList<T> {

    private class Node{//节点类
//        public 属性保证在类的外面可以访问，不写setter和getter方法
        public T t;//存储数据
        public Node next;//指向下一个节点
        public Node(T t,Node next){
            this.t = t;
            this.next = next;
        }
        public Node(T t){
            this(t,null);
        }
        public Node(){
            this(null,null);
        }

        @Override
        public String toString() {
            return t.toString();
        }
    }
    //使用虚拟头结点方便添加和删除
    private Node dummyHead;//表示第一个元素的前一个元素
    private int size;//记录元素个数
    public LinkedList(){
        dummyHead = new Node(null,null);
        size = 0;
    }

    public int getSize(){
        return size;
    }
    public boolean isEmpty(){
        return size == 0;
    }
    //向链表的指定索引位置中添加元素
    public void add(int index,T t){
        if(index < 0 || index > size)
            throw new IllegalArgumentException("添加元素失败，下标不合法。");
        //找到要删除元素的前一个元素
        Node prev = dummyHead;
        for (int i = 0; i < index; i++) {
            prev = prev.next;
        }
        //添加元素过程
        //1.新元素的next指向pre的next
        //2.pre.next指向新元素
        prev.next = new Node(t,prev.next);
        size++;
    }
    //在链表的头部插入元素
    public void addFirst(T t){
        add(0,t);
    }
    //在链表的末尾插入元素
    public void addLast(T t){
        add(size,t);
    }
    //删除指定索引位置的元素
    public T remove(int index){
        if(index < 0 || index >= size)
            throw new IllegalArgumentException("删除元素失败，索引不合法。");
        Node prev = dummyHead;
        for (int i = 0; i < index; i++) {
            prev = prev.next;//下移到要删除元素的前一个元素
        }
        Node retNode = prev.next;//保存返回值
        prev.next = retNode.next;
        retNode.next = null;
        size--;
        return retNode.t;
    }
    //删除链表头部元素
    public T removeFitrst(){
        return remove(0);
    }
    //删除链表末尾的元素
    public T removeLast(){
        return remove(size-1);
    }
    //获取指定位置的元素
    public T get(int index){
        if(index < 0 || index >= size)
            throw new IllegalArgumentException("元素获取失败，索引不合法。");
        Node cur = dummyHead.next;
        for (int i = 0; i < index; i++) {
            cur = cur.next;
        }
        return cur.t;
    }
    //获取链表头部元素
    public T getFirst(){
        return get(0);
    }
    //获取链表尾部的元素
    public T getLast(){
        return get(size-1);
    }
    //判断是否包含某个元素
    public boolean contains(T t){
        Node cur = dummyHead.next;
        while(cur != null){
            if(cur.t.equals(t))
                return true;
            cur = cur.next;
        }
        return false;
    }
    //修改指定位置的元素
    public void set(int index,T t){
        if(index < 0 || index >= size)
            throw new IllegalArgumentException("修改元素失败，索引不合法。");
        Node cur = dummyHead.next;
        for (int i = 0; i < index; i++) {
            cur = cur.next;
        }
        cur.t = t;
    }

    @Override
    public String toString() {
        StringBuilder stringBuilder = new StringBuilder();
        stringBuilder.append("LinkedList ");
        Node cur = dummyHead.next;
        while(cur != null){
            stringBuilder.append(cur.t +" -> ");
            cur = cur.next;
        }
        stringBuilder.append("NULL");
        return stringBuilder.toString();
    }

    public static void main(String[] args) {
        LinkedList<Integer> list = new LinkedList<>();
        for (int i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
            list.addFirst(i);
        }
        list.add(3,99);
        System.out.println(list);
        list.remove(3);
        System.out.println(list);
        System.out.println(list.contains(5));

    }
}

栈

package datastructure.stack;

import datastructure.Array.Array;

/**
 * 使用动态数组实现栈
 * @param <T>
 */
public class ArrayStack<T> implements Stack<T>{
    private Array<T> array;
    public ArrayStack(){
        array = new Array<>();
    }
    public ArrayStack(int capacity){
        array = new Array<>(capacity);
    }
    @Override
    public int getSize() {
        return array.getSize();
    }
    public int getCapacity(){
        return array.getCapacity();
    }

    @Override
    public boolean isEmpty() {
        return array.isEmpty();
    }

    @Override
    public T pop() {
        return array.removeLast();
    }

    @Override
    public void push(T t) {
        array.addLast(t);
    }

    @Override
    public T peek() {
        return array.getLast();
    }

    @Override
    public String toString() {
        StringBuilder stringBuilder = new StringBuilder();
        stringBuilder.append("ArrayStack [ ");
        for (int i = 0; i < getSize(); i++) {
            stringBuilder.append(array.get(i));
            if(i != getSize() -1)
                stringBuilder.append(" , ");
        }
        stringBuilder.append(" ] top");
        return stringBuilder.toString();
    }

    public static void main(String[] args) {
        ArrayStack<Integer> arrayStack = new ArrayStack<>();
        for (int i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
            arrayStack.push(i);
            if(i % 3 == 2){
                arrayStack.pop();
            }
            System.out.println(arrayStack);
        }


    }
}

链表实现栈

package datastructure.stack;

import datastructure.linkedlist.LinkedList;

public class LinkedListStack<T> implements Stack<T>{
    private LinkedList<T> list;
    public LinkedListStack(){
        list = new LinkedList<>();
    }
    @Override
    public int getSize() {
        return list.getSize();
    }

    @Override
    public boolean isEmpty() {
        return list.isEmpty();
    }

    @Override
    public T pop() {
        return list.removeFitrst();
    }

    @Override
    public void push(T t) {
        list.addFirst(t);
    }

    @Override
    public T peek() {
        return list.getFirst();
    }

    @Override
    public String toString() {
        StringBuilder stringBuilder = new StringBuilder();
        stringBuilder.append("LinkedListStack top ");
        stringBuilder.append(list.toString().substring(11));
        return stringBuilder.toString();
    }

    public static void main(String[] args) {
        LinkedListStack<Integer> stack = new LinkedListStack<>();
        for (int i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
            stack.push(i);
            System.out.println(stack);
            if(i % 3 == 2){
                stack.pop();
                System.out.println(stack);
            }
        }
    }
}

队列

package datastructure.queue;

import datastructure.Array.Array;

public class ArrayQueue <T> implements Queue<T>{
    private Array<T> array;
    public ArrayQueue(){
     array = new Array<>();
    }
    public ArrayQueue(int capacity){
        array = new Array<>(capacity);
    }
    @Override
    public int getSize() {
        return array.getSize();
    }

    @Override
    public boolean isEmpty() {
        return array.isEmpty();
    }

    @Override
    public void enqueue(T t) {
        array.addLast(t);
    }

    @Override
    public T dequeue() {
        return array.removeFirst();
    }

    @Override
    public T getFront() {
        return array.getFirst();
    }

    @Override
    public String toString() {
        StringBuilder stringBuilder = new StringBuilder();
        stringBuilder.append("ArrayQueue top [");
        for (int i = 0; i < getSize(); i++) {
            stringBuilder.append(array.get(i));
            if(i != getSize() -1)
                stringBuilder.append(" , ");
        }
        stringBuilder.append(" ] tail");
        return stringBuilder.toString();
    }

    public static void main(String[] args) {
        ArrayQueue<Integer> arrayQueue = new ArrayQueue<>();
        for (int i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
            arrayQueue.enqueue(i);
            if (i % 3 == 2)
                arrayQueue.dequeue();
            System.out.println(arrayQueue);
        }

    }
}

循环队列

package datastructure.queue;

/**
 *循环队列实现，目的是为了使出队操作的均摊复杂度为O(1)
 * @param <T>
 */
public class LoopQueue<T> implements Queue<T> {
    private T[] data;//存放数据
    private int front;//标识队列的头部
    private int tail;//标识队列的尾部的下一个位置
    private int size;//标识队列中的元素个数
    /*
    *说明：
    * 1.队空条件：front = tail
    * 2.队满条件:尾部元素的下一个元素是队首元素，使得我们必须浪费一个空间标记队满
    * 3.队满时添加元素要扩容
     */
    public LoopQueue(int capacity){
        data = (T[]) new Object[capacity + 1];//我们浪费了一个空间，用户是不知道的。
        front = 0;
        tail = 0;
        size = 0;
    }
    public LoopQueue(){
        this(10);
    }
    @Override
    public int getSize() {
        return size;
    }
    public int getCapacity(){
        return data.length -1;
    }
    @Override
    public boolean isEmpty() {
        return size == 0;
    }
    @Override
    public void enqueue(T t) {
        if((tail+1)% data.length == front)//if(size == getCapacity())//有一个空间浪费
            resize(getCapacity() << 1);//扩容
        data[tail] = t;
        tail = (tail + 1) % data.length;
        size++;
    }
    private void resize(int newCapacity){
        T[] newData = (T[]) new Object[newCapacity + 1];
        for (int i = 0; i < size; i++) {
            newData[i] = data[front];
            front = (front+1) % data.length;
        }
        data = newData;
        front = 0;
        tail = size;
    }
    @Override
    public T dequeue() {
        T t = data[front];
        data[front] = null;
        front = (front +1) % data.length;
        size--;
        if(size == getCapacity() >> 2 && getCapacity() >> 1 != 0 )
            resize(getCapacity() >> 1);
        return t;
    }

    @Override
    public T getFront() {
        return data[front];
    }

    @Override
    public String toString() {
        StringBuilder stringBuilder = new StringBuilder();
        stringBuilder.append(String.format("LoopQueue [size:%d , capacity:%d]\n",size,getCapacity()));
        stringBuilder.append("LoopQueue front [ ");
        for (int i = front; i != tail ; i = (i + 1) % data.length) {
            stringBuilder.append(data[i]);
            if ((i + 1) % data.length != tail)
                stringBuilder.append(" , ");
        }
        stringBuilder.append(" ] tail");
        return stringBuilder.toString();
    }
    public static void main(String[] args) {
        LoopQueue<Integer> loopQueue = new LoopQueue<>();
        for (int i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
            loopQueue.enqueue(i);
            if(i % 3 == 2)
                loopQueue.dequeue();
            System.out.println(loopQueue);
        }
//        System.out.println(loopQueue);
//        loopQueue.enqueue(100);
//        System.out.println(loopQueue);
//        loopQueue.dequeue();
//        System.out.println(loopQueue);
    }
}

链表实现队列

package datastructure.queue;

import datastructure.stack.LinkedListStack;

public class LinkedListQueue<T> implements Queue<T> {
    private class Node{
        public T t;
        public Node next;
        public Node(T t,Node next){
            this.t = t;
            this.next = next;
        }
        public Node(T t){
            this(t,null);
        }
        public Node(){
            this(null,null);
        }

        @Override
        public String toString() {
            return t.toString();
        }
    }
    //设置含有尾指针的链表实现队列
    //注意点：空元素队列的插入head的处理，和最后一个元素删除tail的处理
    private Node head;
    private Node tail;
    private int size;
    public LinkedListQueue(){
        head = null;
        tail = null;
        size = 0;
    }
    @Override
    public int getSize() {
        return size;
    }

    @Override
    public boolean isEmpty() {
        return size == 0;
    }

    @Override
    public void enqueue(T t) {
        //判断是否是第一个元素入队
        if(tail == null){
            tail = new Node(t);
            head = tail;
        }else {
            tail.next = new Node(t);
            tail = tail.next;
        }
        size++;
    }

    @Override
    public T dequeue() {
        //注意出队最后一个元素tail的处理
        if(head == null)
            throw new IllegalArgumentException("队列为空无法删除。");
        Node retNode = head;
        head = head.next;
        retNode.next = null;
        if(head == null)//删除最后一个元素要注意
            tail = null;
        return retNode.t;
    }

    @Override
    public T getFront() {
        return head.t;
    }

    @Override
    public String toString() {
        StringBuilder stringBuilder = new StringBuilder();
        stringBuilder.append("LinkedListQueue front ");
        Node cur = head;
        while (cur != null){
            stringBuilder.append(cur.t +" -> ");
            cur = cur.next;
        }
        stringBuilder.append("NULL tail");
        return stringBuilder.toString();
    }

    public static void main(String[] args) {
        LinkedListQueue<Integer> Queue = new LinkedListQueue<>();
        for (int i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
            Queue.enqueue(i);
            System.out.println(Queue);
            if(i % 3 == 2){
                Queue.dequeue();
                System.out.println(Queue);
            }
        }
    }
}
